vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
generated_parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

verify.rule: All required fields are present and non-empty.
Mass estimation is provided and plausible for the subsystem.
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels, and connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature are specified.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary conditions are specified with fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high-altitude operation and pressurized avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management systems and conduct thermal analysis.

risk.desc: Risk of avionics bay overheating during long-duration missions.
risk.mit: Ensure adequate cooling solutions and monitor avionics temperature.

risk.desc: Structural integrity under extreme weather conditions (rain, dust, salt).
risk.mit: Use weather-resistant materials and coatings.

risk.desc: Serviceability of avionics bay in field conditions.
risk.mit: Design for easy access and maintainability.

risk.desc: Potential for nacelle loads to exceed design limits.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and validation.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.description: Transfers rotor thrust and tilt servo loads into wing structure
Airflow management for avionics cooling
Conducts heat from avionics bay to fuselage for dissipation
GPS antenna motion path for scanning
Structural load from air pressure on fuselage
Data and power routing from avionics bay to fuselage
Service access for avionics bay maintenance

integration_opportunities.description: Data and power routing from avionics bay to fuselage
Service access for avionics bay maintenance
GPS antenna motion path for scanning

verify.value: All required features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.

mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal naming and exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Interfaces must name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential fatigue failure at wing spar socket due to cyclic loading from nacelle tilt.
risk.mit: Implement fatigue analysis and reinforce critical areas with additional material.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP skin and aluminum components.
risk.mit: Use compatible materials or design with thermal expansion in mind.

risk.desc: Service access for nacelle tilt mechanism may be limited in high-altitude variants.
risk.mit: Ensure service access is designed for all mission variants.

risk.desc: Potential for water ingress through service access ports.
risk.mit: Design with proper sealing and drainage features.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load path from fuselage spine to wing spar.
risk.mit: Conduct load path analysis and reinforce if necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

Thermal path from wing skin to spar
Pressure path from wing surface to spar

verify.rule: Ensure all required fields are present

risk.desc: Potential misalignment between tilt axis and wing spar socket could lead to structural failure
risk.mit: Implement alignment verification step during assembly

risk.desc: Cooling fins may not be efficient enough to dissipate heat from motor and ESC
risk.mit: Optimize cooling fin design and material selection

risk.desc: Access covers may not provide sufficient clearance for maintenance operations
risk.mit: Increase clearance around motor and ESC access covers

risk.desc: Field maintenance access may be obstructed by internal components
risk.mit: Design access paths to avoid internal obstructions

risk.desc: Thermal performance may be compromised due to insufficient heat sink capacity
risk.mit: Increase heat sink capacity or improve heat dissipation design

Ensure easy access to motor and ESC for regular maintenance.

generated_parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
generated_parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

verify.value: All required features and geometry operations are present.
verify.rule: Each part_tree child must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops that reference it by id or target name.

verify.value: The mass estimate is provided and plausible for the subsystem scale.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: [p0_feature_mapping] good: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm, and reciprocal interfaces are named.
verify.rule: [interface_fit_class] good: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Joint evidence rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are defined with appropriate coordinates.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points (list of {at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}), thermal_zones (list of {at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}), and pressure_faces (list of {face:string, Pa:number}).

verify.value: Geometry operations are distributed across the subsystem volume with distinct coordinate regions.
verify.rule: Coordinate distribution rule: geometry_ops args.at [x,y,z] must be physically distributed across the local subsystem volume.

verify.value: Uses a variety of geometry operations including drill, pocket, boss, channel, cylinder, chamfer, fillet, pattern, and engrave.
verify.rule: [non_box_feature_variety] good: Uses drill, pocket, boss, channel, cylinder, chamfer, fillet, pattern, and engrave where appropriate.

verify.value: cad_brief includes an ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.
verify.rule: [assembly_sequence_defined] good: cad_brief includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Dimensions match the tiltrotor scale and are physically plausible for the subsystem scale.
verify.rule: [dimensional_realism] good: Dimensions match tiltrotor scale: 200-1500mm wingspan, 50-300mm fuselage dia. Wall thickness, hole diameters, fillet radii are physically plausible.

risk.desc: The tilt axis may experience wear over time due to repetitive motion.
risk.mit: Implement a wear-resistant coating on the tilt axis and use high-quality bearings.

risk.desc: The servo linkage may become misaligned during assembly.
risk.mit: Include alignment pins and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: The access cover may not provide adequate protection in harsh environments.
risk.mit: Use a weatherproof material for the access cover and ensure proper sealing.

risk.desc: The thermal channel may not efficiently dissipate heat from the servo.
risk.mit: Optimize the thermal channel design and consider adding additional cooling features.

risk.desc: The sensor pocket may not accommodate all necessary sensors.
risk.mit: Review the sensor requirements and adjust the sensor pocket design accordingly.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on sensor due to high altitude operation.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or active cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage during assembly due to insufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and proper bend radius.

risk.mit: Add keying or labeling to connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at nose bay mounting flange.
risk.mit: Conduct FEA to ensure the mounting flange can withstand vehicle loads.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for sensor replacement.
risk.mit: Ensure service access panels are designed for easy access and replacement.

Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

verify.rule: Ensure all required fields and structures are present.
Ensure the mass estimate is a numeric value.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure all interfaces have reciprocal connection_type, DOF, and clearance.
Ensure critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.
Ensure boundary_conditions object is correctly formatted.

risk.desc: Potential fatigue failure at high-altitude due to thin-air optimized props.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue analysis and implement appropriate strengthening measures.

risk.desc: Risk of harness strain if bend radius not respected near moving joints.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Service access may be compromised if service hatch is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Design service hatch with clear access and ensure it is easily removable.

risk.desc: Incorrect keying or labeling of connectors can lead to mis-mating.
risk.mit: Implement clear keying or labeling on all connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance at critical interfaces may cause jamming or failure.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical interfaces have appropriate clearances and fit classes.
